headline: SLB stock dips despite meeting earnings expectations
summary: Investing.com -- SLB (NYSE:SLB) reported first-quarter results that met analyst expectations for earnings while revenue slightly exceeded forecasts, though shares fell 2.7% following the release as Middle East disruptions weighed.

content.title: SLB stock dips despite meeting earnings expectations
content.summary: Investing.com -- SLB (NYSE:SLB) reported first-quarter results that met analyst expectations for earnings while revenue slightly exceeded forecasts, though shares fell 2.7% following the release as Middle East disruptions weighed.

headline: SLB Stock Tumbles on Earnings as CEO Cites ‘Challenging Start to the Year’
summary: While  SLB  claimed in January that its struggles in key regions were over, Friday’s earnings report signaled challenges continue for the oilfield services provider.  CEO Olivier Le Peuch conceded that SLB had “a challenging start to the year” as conflict in the Middle East affected its business, with a pronounced impact on its well construction and reservoir performance divisions.  “SLB demobilized operations in a number of countries in response to customer actions to safeguard personnel and facilities,” Le Peuch said.

content.title: SLB Stock Tumbles on Earnings as CEO Cites ‘Challenging Start to the Year’
content.summary: While  SLB  claimed in January that its struggles in key regions were over, Friday’s earnings report signaled challenges continue for the oilfield services provider.  CEO Olivier Le Peuch conceded that SLB had “a challenging start to the year” as conflict in the Middle East affected its business, with a pronounced impact on its well construction and reservoir performance divisions.  “SLB demobilized operations in a number of countries in response to customer actions to safeguard personnel and facilities,” Le Peuch said.

headline: SLB (NYSE:SLB) Exceeds Q1 CY2026 Expectations
summary: Oilfield services provider SLB (NYSE:SLB) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, but sales fell by 6.3% year on year to $8.72 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.52 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: SLB (NYSE:SLB) Exceeds Q1 CY2026 Expectations
content.summary: Oilfield services provider SLB (NYSE:SLB) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, but sales fell by 6.3% year on year to $8.72 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.52 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.
